TrailingProfileType.description: Trailing profile discriminator (mirrors octobot_trading TrailingProfileTypes values).

CancelPolicyType.description: Cancel policy class name (mirrors octobot_trading cancel_policy_factory).

ActiveOrderSwapStrategyType.description: Active order swap strategy class name (mirrors octobot_trading active_order_swap_strategy_factory).

OrderGroupType.description: Order group class name (mirrors persisted OrderGroup.__name__ in octobot_trading).

Debug.description: Debug view of all automations and user actions

authentication_id.description: The id of the account authentication bound to this account

MarketMakingReferencePair.description: Reference price source for market making (exchange pair, weighting, and optional formula).

exchange.description: Exchange id, or a sentinel such as local exchange price when supported by the trading mode.

pair.description: Pair symbol (e.g. 'BTC/USDT' for a CEX or 'WETH/USDC@ETH-UNISWAP' for a DEX).

formula.description: Optional formula overriding the default latest price for this source.

MarketMakingOrderBookDepth.description: Order book depth parameters (cumulated volume and daily volume fraction).

MarketMakingScheduledVolume.description: Scheduled volume order sizing and timing in quote currency.

MarketMakingStopConditions.description: Optional holdings and volatility thresholds used for automations / stop behavior.

average_price_counted_minutes.description: Minutes window for average price when evaluating volatility stops.

MarketMakingOrdersDistribution.description: How order prices are spaced across the book.

MarketMakingFundsDistribution.description: How allocated funds are spread across ladder levels.

min_spread.description: Minimum spread as a percentage (e.g. 0.5 for 0.5%).

name.description: Evaluator tentacle class name, e.g. RSIMomentumEvaluator
Strategy evaluator tentacle class name, e.g. SimpleStrategyEvaluator
Trading mode tentacle class name, e.g. DCATradingMode, GridTradingMode

signal_payload.description: Optional payload associated with the signal type
